action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 9 crashed with 'backward through the graph a second time' due to flawed Group DRO implementation (multiple backward calls per step). Previous best eval: 0.3999 worst-region (Africa) with ViT-B 10 epochs single-GPU. Time budget 6.5h, 21 iterations left. Analysis: Need stable Group DRO to directly optimize worst-region accuracy. Must fix backward to compute weighted loss once per step and update group weights (q) correctly. ViT-B fine-tuning with 4 GPUs, class-balanced sampler, and strong augmentation should improve Africa accuracy. Decision: Rewrite train.py with correct Group DRO, per-sample weighting, q-update avoided gradients. Use ViT-B (stable), 30 epochs, 4-GPU DataParallel, cosine schedule, grad clipping, log per-region val accuracy, save best checkpoint based on worst-region val accuracy. Submit eval after training.
